title: Weekly pay from an annual salary
problem: An employee earns an annual salary of $\$62\,400$. Calculate their weekly pay.

steps.instruction: Identify the annual salary and the number of weeks in a year.
Use the formula: weekly pay $=$ annual salary $\div\ 52$.
Divide to find the weekly pay.

title: Gross weekly pay including time-and-a-half overtime
problem: Hamish earns $\$25.00$ per hour for a standard $38$-hour week. He works $6$ hours overtime at time-and-a-half. Calculate his total gross weekly pay.

steps.instruction: Calculate ordinary pay for the standard 38 hours.
Find the time-and-a-half rate by multiplying the hourly rate by 1.5.
Calculate overtime pay for the 6 extra hours.
Add ordinary pay and overtime pay.

title: Fortnightly gross income with weekend and public holiday penalty rates
problem: Nadia earns $\$32.00$ per hour. In a fortnight she works $76$ ordinary hours, $6$ hours on Saturday at time-and-a-half and $4$ hours on a public holiday at double time. Calculate her fortnightly gross income.

steps.instruction: Find the Saturday penalty rate (time-and-a-half) and calculate Saturday pay.
Find the public holiday rate (double time) and calculate public holiday pay.
steps.working:
$$\text{Public holiday rate} = \$32.00 \times 2 = \$64.00 \text{ per hour}$$
$$\text{Public holiday pay} = 4 \times \$64.00 = \$256.00$$

steps.instruction: Add all three components to find the fortnightly gross income.
